title: Hallelujah! Raise, O Raise

verses.text: From this time and evermore bless the name of God the LORD. From the sunrise to its rest, may the name of God be blest.
Far above the nations high, glorious far above the sky, who is like the LORD on high, gazing down on earth and sky?
